title: Daily CM Standup to discuss progress and blockers
meeting_title: Daily CM Standup to discuss progress and blockers

transcript.text: So I'm watching the call from yesterday, and they mentioned that they have, they want to like not target data engineers.
I think that's what they said, if I called that properly.
So the one article I'm writing, or have written, is speaking about, let me just get the topic right, how AI agents are changing the role of data engineers.

And I had spoken directly to data engineers, but I think maybe I should just pivot that one to be like speaking to people in, you know, who are leaders, and explaining to them how that role is going to change.
Do you think that's a good pivot?
Or should I just leave it still speaking to data engineers?
No, I think we should still address data engineers.
What they're going to do is, they want to do a major change in their go to market strategy.
They don't want to go after big accounts now, they want to go after smaller accounts, and they want to target more of the end user as opposed to the decision maker.
everybody.
or leader in the data team.
And that end user doesn't have to even be a data engineer or data analyst or anything like that.
They could just be regular marketers and people who work in the sales department and all that.
Because they are pretty much thinking of anyone as their target market now who wants to analyze some data.
Because everyone has to analyze data at one point or another.
So I think right now, the most recent topics that we have, like the topics that we are currently working on, they're already in that direction.
They're already talking about data as a team sport.
And they're already very general, they're not technical, they're not targeting any chief data officers or anything like that.
So I think we are good when it comes to topics.
They have shared a bunch of documents.
So that's on me to go through them and come up with new topics for should do this for them.
They are also going to shift to Prophecy.ai, which is another big shift for them.
So there's a lot of moving parts right now.
I think the best strategy for us, we just keep working on the approved topics.
And because I don't think there's any topics that are too technical or they're addressing data professionals only.
And then I've come up with a new major topics for them by Friday.
So, yeah, that's pretty much it.
It seems very chaotic over there.
They are worried.
I think their CMO either left or it was let go.
And now, yeah, so they're a bit chaotic over there.
And I think mostly because for the longest time, they were offering something that was very Databricks specific.
Yes.
Now it's more.
Now data, but Databricks became their competitor.
Oh, yes, because they also created that self-serve, like, oh, no.
So that's like, that was pretty much the whole business model, right?
That we do this one thing, and now Databricks is doing it.

So if you are, like, let's say you work at a hospital or at a bank or anything, and you're looking into using Databricks, you're not going to look to add on ProfitD, right, anymore, because Databricks is already offering that.
I think that ProfitD did.
So that's the big, that's why I think things are a bit too hard.
But for us, like, we would just continue working with the approved topics, and I'll just send new topics.
And then hopefully, maybe we can help out with their migration and stuff, because they haven't hired anyone.
They have a very thin marketing team.
I think they just have four or five people over there.
So they're not going to be able to do the migration in-house, and they'll probably need an agency for that.
So we'll be right
probably offer our services in that regard, and hopefully it will work.
Interesting.
Okay.
And then the other thing I had is I think the artifacts will probably need to be updated.
Is that something Daryl will do?
Should I chat with him?
Artifacts will be updated for what?
For like the company context and yeah, just the company and the audience personas.
I think I already need to update the artifacts to change.
I think it speaks about the data co-pilot and we need to update it with the AI agent stuff.
And then obviously we need to just pivot.
I think it's very focused on the old stuff that they wanted to mention before.
Yeah, that's Daryl.
Okay, I'll chat with him.
But I don't know if we're going to immediately do it because their DTM is not, I don't think it's confirmed yet.
Okay, so we wait until that happens and then we can alter it.
Yeah.
That works.
Cool.
Awesome, so I'm finishing articles, and yeah, I should be goodbye tomorrow.
All right, okay, have a nice day.
Yeah, you too.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Daily check-in to discuss ProfitD content strategy shifts and address recent company changes.](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [ProfitD pivoting to target smaller accounts and end-users, moving away from data professionals](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Major shift to Prophecy.ai platform upcoming; current approved topics still relevant](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Internal chaos at ProfitD due to CMO departure and Databricks competition](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue with approved topics; new major topics due by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [Shift from targeting data engineers to broader end-user base (marketers, sales, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Current topics (e.g., "data as a team sport") align with new direction](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Maintain focus on non-technical, general audience content](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Ehtisham to develop new major topics by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

### ProfitD Company Changes

  - [Possible CMO departure causing internal turbulence](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Thin marketing team (4-5 people) struggling with workload](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Shifting from Databricks-specific offering due to direct competition](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Potential opportunity for GrowthX to assist with migration to Prophecy.ai](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

### Content Production Updates

  - [Saskia adapting article on "AI agents changing the role of data engineers"](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Continuing work on approved topics; no immediate need for major changes](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Artifact updates (company context, audience personas) on hold until DTM confirmation](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

### Potential New Business Opportunities

  - [GrowthX may offer services for ProfitD's platform migration](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Possibility to leverage thin marketing team for additional support](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Saskia to complete current articles by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Ehtisham to review shared documents and develop new topics by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Hold off on updating artifacts until ProfitD's go-to-market strategy is confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Continue producing content based on approved topics](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Explore potential to offer migration services to ProfitD](https://fathom.video/share/GbbxNeBVfpthqN_St7ah4ubgyALobo9N?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

action_items.description: Review shared docs, develop new topics for ProfitD's pivot to smaller accounts/end users. Send by Fri. Consider Prophecy.ai shift, non-technical focus.
